description: CSS pseudo-elements: ::before and ::after with content, display:block pseudo, CSS counters, nested counters, decorative pseudo
visual_assertions: The ::before star (★) and ::after star (★) should appear in yellow flanking the 'Star-decorated text'
The quote paragraph should have opening (\u201C) and closing (\u201D) curly quote marks in indigo
The 'Note:' label should appear in bold red before the paragraph text via ::before
The block-pseudo paragraphs should each have a 4px blue vertical bar on their left side
The counter list should show '1. First item', '2. Second item', etc. in bold green
The nested counter list should show '1. Introduction', '1.1 Background', '1.2 Motivation', '2. Methods', etc.
The decorated box should show a small 'SAMPLE' label in the top-right corner
